# Ahmad Nassar — AI-Focused Full Stack Engineer

Software engineer specialising in AI / LLM integration, agentic systems, and shipped full-stack products. Based in Amman, Jordan. Open to full-time, contract, and collaboration.

> Source of truth for this profile: https://ahmadnassarportfolio.vercel.app/api/cv.json (structured JSON)

## At a glance

- **Role:** Software Engineer · AI-Focused Full Stack Developer
- **Education:** B.Sc. Software Engineering, Al-Zaytoonah University of Jordan (2025)
- **Location:** Amman, Jordan · open to remote
- **Languages:** Arabic (native), English (professional)
- **Email:** ahmad.nassar5903@gmail.com
- **GitHub:** https://github.com/AhmadNassar03
- **LinkedIn:** https://linkedin.com/in/ahmad-nassar-27275123b

## Primary stack

- **AI / LLM:** Groq Llama-3.3-70b · Gemini 2.0 Flash · Claude (Anthropic) · OpenAI · MCP (Model Context Protocol) · agentic pipelines · prompt engineering · n8n
- **Backend:** ASP.NET Core · Node.js · FastAPI · REST · WebSockets
- **Frontend:** Next.js (14+) · TypeScript · React · Tailwind CSS
- **Data:** PostgreSQL · SQL Server · MySQL · Oracle · Supabase · Prisma · Drizzle
- **Cloud / DevOps:** Vercel · Railway · Docker · GitHub Actions · CI/CD
- **CV / ML:** TensorFlow.js · YOLOv8

## Featured projects

- **OmniAgent** — Production omnichannel AI SaaS routing customer conversations through an LLM-powered agent (Groq Llama-3.3-70b primary, Gemini 2.0 Flash fallback), multi-tenant Supabase, n8n orchestration. Live: https://omnichannel-saas-zeta.vercel.app
- **LeadGrade** — AI lead scoring SaaS for debt-relief intake. TCPA + FTC TSR compliance hard stops, Gemini semantic 0–100 scoring, role-based dashboards, Recharts analytics. Live: https://lead-scoring-rho.vercel.app
- **WorkForce AI** — Real-time workplace monitoring with TensorFlow.js + YOLOv8 inference, MJPEG ingest, WebSocket dashboard.
- **SiyanahJo** — Vehicle maintenance booking platform (graduation project). ASP.NET Core + SQL Server + Flutter.

## Experience

- **Orange Jordan** — ASP.NET Developer (Mar–Jun 2025): enterprise web apps in ASP.NET Core + SQL Server, RESTful APIs, Agile/Scrum.
- **Future Advanced Internet Solutions** — ASP.NET Developer Intern (Sep–Dec 2024): MVC + Entity Framework, query optimisation, role-based auth.
- **SHAI for AI** — Full Stack Developer Intern (May–Sep 2022): JavaScript + C# full-stack, third-party API integration in an AI product environment.

## Working with Ahmad

Best fit: AI engineering, LLM integration, full-stack roles where the team values shipping over experimentation. Strong on backend fundamentals (ASP.NET, Node.js, Postgres) plus modern AI tooling (Claude, Groq, MCP). Comfortable owning a feature end-to-end.
